sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مُدِيرُ الْقِسْمِ مِنْ عَامِرٍ أَنْ يُنَظِّمَ الْأَرْشِيفَ.
sentences.translation: Šef odjela je tražio od Amira da organizira arhivu.
sentences.translationEn: The department manager asked Amer to organise the archive.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ عَامِرٌ يُرَتِّبُ الْمَجَلَّدَاتِ حَسَبَ التَّارِيخِ.
sentences.translation: Amir je počeo slagati fascikle po datumu.
sentences.translationEn: Amer started arranging the folders according to date.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَغْرَقَ الْعَمَلُ سَاعَتَيْنِ وَلَكِنَّهُ انْتَهَى بِشَكْلٍ جَيِّدٍ.
sentences.translation: Posao je trajao dva sata ali je dobro završen.
sentences.translationEn: The work took two hours but it ended well.

sentences.translation: Direktor ga je pohvalio za dobro sređivanje.
sentences.translationEn: The manager praised him for the good arrangement.
